name: Tennessee Early Intervention System (TEIS)
description: Part C early intervention program for infants and toddlers birth to age 3 with developmental delays or disabilities and their families.

name: The Arc Tennessee
description: Statewide advocacy organization for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities providing resources, advocacy, and community support.

name: Special Olympics Tennessee
description: Year-round sports training and competition for children and adults with intellectual disabilities throughout Tennessee.

name: Disability Rights Tennessee
description: Federally designated protection and advocacy organization providing free legal advocacy for Tennesseans with disabilities.

name: Tennessee Vocational Rehabilitation
description: State vocational rehabilitation program providing job training, placement, and employment support for Tennesseans with disabilities.

name: NAMI Tennessee
description: State chapter of the National Alliance on Mental Illness offering advocacy, free mental health support, online groups, and education programs for individuals and families affected by mental illness.
address: 131 Sanders Ferry Rd., Suite B, Hendersonville, TN 37075

name: Tennessee Technology Access Program (TTAP)
description: Tennessee's assistive technology program providing device demonstrations, equipment loans, and AT solutions for individuals with disabilities.

name: Tennessee ABLE Account
description: Tax-advantaged ABLE savings accounts for Tennesseans with disabilities to save money without affecting eligibility for public benefits.

name: Vanderbilt Kennedy Center - Developmental Pediatrics
description: Nationally recognized center for developmental disabilities at Vanderbilt University providing comprehensive evaluations, diagnosis, and treatment for children.

name: ABLE Youth
description: Nonprofit helping children and young adults with physical disabilities learn independence through adaptive sports including wheelchair basketball, Super Sports Saturdays, and competitive teams.
